name: input
title: Input
description: A form input directive (selector: input[z-input], textarea[z-input]). Implements ControlValueAccessor for Angular Forms integration. Supports text, textarea, and numeric inputs with size variants (default, sm, lg), status variants (error, warning, success), and borderless mode.

cena.classificationRationale: Styled input directive with CVA variant axes (zType, zSize, zStatus, zBorderless). Brain behavior supplied by native HTML input/textarea + Angular's NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR contract — no separate behavior primitive to install. Uses signal-based state (input(), model(), linkedSignal, effect, computed) per Angular 21 idiom.

preferenceLedgerRows.name: signal input()/output() I/O
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: uses input() and model() for all reactive bindings
